ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model and its purpose */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the data_sources table */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model associated with the metrics */,
  "logLik" REAL /* Log-likelihood of the model */,
  "AIC" REAL /* Akaike Information Criterion value */,
  "BIC" REAL /* Bayesian Information Criterion value */,
  "df_residual" INTEGER /* Degrees of freedom for the residuals */,
  "nobs" INTEGER /* Number of observations used in the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was calculated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last logged in */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed for security) */,
  "email_verified" INTEGER /* Email verification status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., database, API, manual entry) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was last updated */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source (if applicable) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON, database) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_inputs" (
  "input_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each input variable */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model this input belongs to */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable used in the model */,
  "variable_type" TEXT /* Type of the variable (e.g., continuous, categorical) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the input variable was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the input variable was last updated */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the input variable (e.g., integer, string, date) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("input_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_inputs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the model */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the original model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was last updated */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model that produced the result */,
  "result_data" TEXT /* Output data from the model (e.g., predictions, coefficients) */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date when the results were generated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model associated with the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_tags_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality check */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the check was performed */,
  "check_result" TEXT /* Result of the quality check (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments about the quality check */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quality check was performed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quality check was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the quality check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who accessed the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model for which the report is generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report (e.g., summary, findings) */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_reports_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
